name: edit
description: Exact-string replacement on a file. `old_string` must be unique unless you set `replace_all=true`. Not a regex. Match exactly, including whitespace. Relative paths resolve against session workdir.

path.description: Path to the file. Relative paths resolve against the session workdir.

old_string.description: Exact substring to replace. Must appear exactly once unless replace_all=true.

replace_all.description: If true, replace every occurrence. Default false.
